world.title: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
world.summary: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.

world.title: Inquiry ordered after building fire kills 15 in north India city
world.summary: Witnesses described people jumping from windows to escape, while rescue teams broke through a wall to save lives.

world.title: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
world.summary: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.

world.title: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
world.summary: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.

world.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
world.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

tech.title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open source bugs
tech.summary: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community better protect itself.

tech.title: Tesla pushes back on Autopilot narrative after fatal Texas crash
tech.summary: Whether the Autopilot system was truly active, overridden, or malfunctioning likely won't be resolved until investigators finish combing through the vehicle's data logs.

tech.title: Shareholders sue Uber’s board over sexual assaults, other incidents
tech.summary: The lawsuit, led by a Detroit pension fund, alleges Uber's board and management has cut too many compliance corners, resulting in thousands of lawsuits.

tech.title: The AI world is getting ‘loopy’
tech.summary: The loop takes agentic AI a step further by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.

tech.title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
tech.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

denmark.title: Denmark Reopens Embassy in Iran
denmark.summary: The Danish government has decided to reopen its embassy in Iran, following a period of diplomatic tensions.

denmark.title: 19-Year-Old Arrested in Hand Grenade Case on Amager
denmark.summary: A 19-year-old suspect has been arrested in connection with a hand grenade incident on the Amager island in Copenhagen.

denmark.title: 800 More People Found Employment in April
denmark.summary: According to recent statistics, 800 more people found employment in Denmark in April, marking a positive trend in the job market.

denmark.title: Roskilde Festival Expected to Cause Congestion on Roads
denmark.summary: The upcoming Roskilde Festival is expected to cause significant congestion on the roads leading to the event, with authorities urging attendees to plan ahead.

denmark.title: Trump's Reflection Pool in Washington to be Refilled
denmark.summary: The reflection pool in Washington D.C., which was renovated by former President Trump, is set to be refilled after a period of maintenance.

greece.title: Βέροια: Αυτοκίλενη εκελεμενη και πλαι πλευ σε τοιχίο- Νεκρός ο 60χρονος οδησελλενη
greece.summary: Τροχαίο δυστύχημα σημειώθηκε χθες (22 Ιουνίου 2026, περίπου στις 20:40) στη Βέροια. Όχημα που οδησε 60χρονος και επέβαινε 64χρονη, εξετράπη της πορείας του και πλαι πλευ σε του και τουτότητα της εκδήλωσης «Κτηταντινούπολης: Κτηταντινούπολης από μια εκκρεμότητα δεκαετιών σε μια νέα εποχή με διαφάνεια, ταχύτητα και ασφάλεια»

greece.title: Μιςή του Πρωθυπουργού στη συζήτηση «Κτηταντινούπολης: Κτηταντινούπολης από μια εκκρεμότητα δεκαετιών σε μια νέα εποχή με διαφάνεια, ταχύτητα και ασφάλεια»

sports.title: Παγώσμια παραγώγή μπίρας: Η χώρα που παρασκεεί 1 στις 5 παγκοστες
sports.summary: Η Κώλα παραμένει ο μεγαλύτερος παραγώγός μπίρας παγκοστες με μώ μία στις πέντε μπίρες που βγαώλουν στο εμπόριο να εώλλαι από αυτή τη χώρα.

sports.title: Αντετοκούλμπο: Godfather και Heat Culture για να νιώσει ξανά τη συντροφιά του δαχτυλιδιού
sports.summary: Ο Νίκος Καρφής γράφει για το μεγάλο μπαμ της μετακόμισης του Γιάννη Αντετοκούλμπο στους Χιτ. Ένας περήφανος οργανισμός με κουμανταδόρο τον Ράιλι και τον Σποέλστρα στον πάγκο αποτελεί ιδανική επιλογή.
